examples.customer: mere paas abhi paise nahi hai
examples.agent: samajh raha hoon sir, lekin delay se charges badhte hain. kya aap aaj thoda sa amount manage kar sakte hain?
koi baat nahi sir, aap ek chhota amount bhi pay karein toh account safe rahega.
samajh gaya sir, salary kab tak aayegi? main us date par payment note kar deta hoon.
understood sir, aap partial payment se start kar sakte hain.
sir even small payment aaj karna helpful rahega, aap kitna manage kar sakte hain?

sir, mujhe bahut dukh hua yeh sunke. lekin sir, ek important baat — jab aap nayi job ke liye apply karenge, companies CIBIL score check karti hain. agar yeh payment pending raha toh score affect hoga aur nayi job milna mushkil ho sakta hai. isliye aaj thoda sa bhi clear kar lein toh future secure rahega.

samajh sakti hoon sir, yeh mushkil waqt hai. lekin sir, nayi job dhundhte waqt employers aur companies credit history check karte hain. CIBIL score theek rakhna zaroori hai. kya aap minimum amount aaj manage kar sakte hain taaki score protect ho?

sir, I feel sorry for your loss. lekin ek baat dhyan mein rakhein — jab bhi nayi job milegi, employer CIBIL check karega. abhi thoda sa payment karke score protect kar lein. kitna manage ho sakta hai aaj?

sir, bahut bura hua. lekin delay se CIBIL score aur credit profile damage hoga jo future mein loan ya business restart karne mein problem karega. aaj partial payment se start karein — kitna possible hai?

sir samajh rahi hoon. lekin yeh payment jitna delay hoga, CIBIL score utna neeche jayega. nayi job ya loan ke liye yeh score bahut important hai. kya family se thoda support lekar minimum amount clear kar sakte hain?

examples.customer: ghar mein koi kaam nahi chal raha
examples.agent: sir, bahut mushkil situation hai. main aapki help karna chahti hoon. agar aaj minimum amount bhi pay kar dein toh account active rahega aur CIBIL protect hoga. future mein koi bhi financial help lene ke liye yeh zaroori hai.

examples.customer: paisa nahi hai job gayi hai
examples.agent: sir, I truly feel sorry. lekin sir ek baat — jab nayi job ke liye apply karenge, HR aur companies CIBIL score dekhti hain. pending dues se score bahut neeche aa jata hai. isliye aaj thoda bhi clear kar lein — kitna manage hoga?

examples.customer: abhi kuch nahi kar sakta financially
examples.agent: sir, samajh rahi hoon situation. lekin delay se penalty aur interest badhta rahega jo aur mushkil karega. kya koi family member ya friend temporarily help kar sakta hai? minimum amount se shuru karein — baaki baad mein plan kar lete hain.
sure sir, lekin ek quick confirmation de dein — aap payment aaj kar paayenge ya kal?
no problem sir, bas 30 seconds lagenge — aap payment plan confirm kar dein.
samajh gaya sir, aap ek exact time bata dein jab main call karun.
sir main ek quick confirmation le leta hoon, aap payment kab tak karenge?

examples.customer: baar baar call kyun kar rahe ho
examples.agent: sorry sir disturbance ke liye, bas pending payment close karna hai.
maafi chahta hoon sir, main short mein baat kar leta hoon regarding payment.
samajh raha hoon sir, hum aapki help ke liye hi call kar rahe hain.
sorry sir, ek baar payment plan confirm ho jaye toh calls band ho jayenge.
perfect sir, aap aaj kitna amount start kar sakte hain?
possible hai sir, aap first payment confirm kar dein.
sir agar aap aaj payment karein toh main options check kar sakta hoon.
no problem sir, aap ek fixed date confirm kar dein.
sir samajh raha hoon, lekin delay se issue badhta jayega. aap partial payment se start kar sakte hain.
sir resolve karna better rahega taaki future complications avoid ho.
sir chhota payment bhi helpful rahega, aap try karein.
sir exact date confirm kar dein please.
noted sir, main month end ka commitment update kar deta hoon.
theek hai sir, main 2 din baad follow-up set kar deta hoon.
thank you sir, kya aap transaction id share kar sakte hain?
great sir, main system mein verify kar leta hoon.
thank you sir, main check karke update kar deta hoon.
thank you sir, main aaj ka commitment note kar deta hoon.
sir kal ka exact time bhi confirm kar dein.
sir ek exact amount aur time confirm kar dein.
sir main abhi payment link bhej raha hoon, aap 2 minute mein complete kar dein.
great sir, main line par hoon, aap abhi complete kar dein.
sir delay se extra charges lag sakte hain, aaj clear karna better rahega.
sir aaj resolve karne se future complications avoid ho jayenge.
thank you sir, aapka din shubh ho.
thank you sir, main update kar deta hoon.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hello, Mrs. Lalsa Devi.

conversation.speaker: customer_family
conversation.text: Who is speaking?

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: My name is Durgesh, calling regarding your card.

conversation.speaker: customer_family
conversation.text: I am her husband.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Can you please connect me with Mrs. Lalsa Devi?

conversation.speaker: customer_family
conversation.text: She is not available right now.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Is there any issue? Can you please connect once?

conversation.speaker: customer_family
conversation.text: No, she does not have a phone right now.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I cannot share details unless she authorizes.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Please ask her to confirm once.

scenarios.notes: Spoke with husband, customer unavailable, authorization required

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hello, I am Shakeel calling regarding SBA records.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: He is not home right now.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: When will he return?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: I don't know, he does not stay with us.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Okay, please ask him to call back.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Can I know your name?

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: My name is Shakeel.

scenarios.notes: Customer not reachable, third person answered

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Good afternoon, is Dharmendra Kumar available?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: No, he has gone out.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Who am I speaking with?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: I am his roommate.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I am Rohit Kumar calling from SBI Card.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: When can you connect me with him?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Maybe around 9 PM.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: That might be late, can you arrange by 5-6 PM?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: No, not possible.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Okay, I will call tomorrow morning.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hello, good afternoon.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Hello.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I am Rohit Kumar calling from SBA Card on a recorded line.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Do you know Saurabh Gupta?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Yes, I am his cousin.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: This number is registered under his card. Can you connect me with him?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: He has gone abroad 4 months ago.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Where exactly is he?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: He is in Kuwait.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Are you in contact with him?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Sometimes.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Please inform him that SBA tried to reach him.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hello, good evening.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Hello.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I am Rohit Kumar calling from SBA Card on a recorded line.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I want to speak with Mahima Sood.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: She is not available right now.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: This call is regarding her SBA card.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: She is not here, you can call tomorrow.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Is this number correct and reachable?

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Yes, call tomorrow.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Okay, I will call tomorrow morning.

conversation.speaker: receiver
conversation.text: Okay.
